message:
feat: tx integration test suite — full pipeline through PaneStepExecutor (ft-y9lnb.5)

9 integration tests exercising TxExecutionEngine<PaneStepExecutor>.execute()
against MockWezterm panes. Covers:
- Happy path with 1 and 3 steps
- Partial failure triggering auto-compensation
- fail_step injection (--fail-step semantics)
- WaitFor timeout via engine
- Mixed action types (lock, send, store, release)
- Observability event emission verification
- All-gates-pass with allow-all policy
- Ledger population after execution

30 total PaneStepExecutor tests, all passing.
Closes ft-y9lnb.5.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
